headline: Regional Natural Gas Storage Helped Southern Californians Avoid Over $120 Million In Energy Costs During Winter Storm Fern
summary: Over the last several years, Southern California Gas Company (SoCalGas) has been working closely with state leaders, policymakers and regulators to enhance natural gas storage capability which is important for energy system resiliency and affordability. Today the company announced a new analysis estimating its four underground natural gas storage fields helped SoCalGas and San Diego Gas & Electric (SDG&E) customers avoid over $120 million in potential energy costs during January's Winter Storm F

headline: Wall Street Turns Bullish on Sempra Energy: Wells Fargo Sets $115 Price Target
summary: Sempra (NYSE:SRE) is getting a fresh look from Wall Street. Wells Fargo analyst Shahriar Pourreza added Sempra to the firm’s Q2 Tactical Ideas List with an Overweight rating and a $115 price target. The call is built on a clear thesis: the story has cleaned up, and the catalysts to re-rate higher are now lining ... Wall Street Turns Bullish on Sempra Energy: Wells Fargo Sets $115 Price Target
